title: OFFCUP Blue Number 10 Balloons, 40 Inch Large Foil Number 1 & 0 Balloons, Self Inflating 10th Birthday Balloon for 10 Year Boys Girls Men Women Anniversary Birthday Party Decorations Supplies
features: 🎉【You will receive】You will receive 2 number balloons, 2 plastic straws, each balloon is 40 inches (101 cm) long, large enough to decorate your family and friends' birthday parties.
🎉【High-quality material】Our number balloons are made of high-quality aluminum foil, non-toxic and harmless, bright and shiny in color, not easy to break; self-sealing design, not easy to leak.

🎉【Easy to use】Comes with a straw to inhale helium or air. After inflation, the aluminum foil balloon valve will automatically close, which is very convenient! There is a hanging hole above the balloon, so you can hang them anywhere. It is recommended to pinch the self-sealing valve to prevent air leakage.

🎉【Reusable】The number balloon set includes 2 straws, which can be used to deflate the aluminum foil balloons. Insert the straw into the valve and press gently until the gas is exhausted. It can be folded and stored for reuse.

🎉【Create an atmosphere】The number balloons are colorful and can quickly add bright colors to your party decorations. They are perfect for birthdays, parties, anniversaries, family reunions, weddings, farewell parties, bachelorette parties and many more occasions.
description: Product Description 5 Colors and High Quality Design 1. This balloon is large enough, the length of each number balloon is about 100 cm. 2. It is made of aluminum-coated foil material, has good sealing performance and can maintain air for a long time. 3. Each balloon is designed with 4-5 hanging holes and equipped with a straw, which makes it more convenient to use. 4. There are combination sets with numbers 0-9 as well as 10, 13, 16, 18, 21, 30, 50, 65, which are suitable for birthday parties of all ages and can also be used as decorations for anniversary celebrations.
